summary: ModifyReservation bridge testing complete. Backend: 14/14 pytest tests passed covering PUT /api/pms/bookings/{id} bridge, idempotency enforcement, outbox events, audit logs, and room-move regression. Frontend: ReservationCalendar page loads correctly (route is /reservation-calendar NOT /calendar) with all controls visible including Find Room, Enterprise/AI/Deluxe+ buttons.
features_tested: Idempotency-Key header required for ModifyReservation (returns 400 if missing) ✅
Same Idempotency-Key + same payload returns same reservation response (idempotent) ✅
New Idempotency-Key for already-applied same target state is deterministic (no duplicate outbox events) ✅
Wrong property scope (x-property-id header mismatch) returns 403 without mutating booking ✅
Wrong tenant cannot modify demo reservation (returns 404) ✅
Room move regression: room_number stays in sync with room_id after room change ✅
Room move regression: booking count stable after room move (no disappearing reservations) ✅
Frontend /reservation-calendar page loads with all controls ✅

issues: Shows 11 overbooking conflicts for Room 101/123 with Ahmet Garcia - test data has intentional overlaps

critical_code_review_comments: UpdateReservationService correctly enforces Idempotency-Key header via ensure_idempotent_request(required=True)
Idempotency lock uses SHA256 hash of tenant_id:scope:key for deduplication with MongoDB upsert pattern
Request hash compares tenant_id + booking_id + normalized payload for conflict detection
Room move updates both room_id and room_number atomically in booking document
outbox_events written with status=pending, processed by OutboxLifecycleWorker
audit_logs written via shared_kernel.audit_helper for compliance trail
seed_data_creation: Backend tests create test reservations with semantic-modify-* prefix during test runs; cleaned up implicitly
context_for_next_testing_agent: ModifyReservation bridge fully operational. PUT /api/pms/bookings/{id} now delegates to UpdateReservationService which enforces Idempotency-Key header, creates outbox events (reservation.modified.v1), and writes audit logs. Frontend ReservationCalendar uses correct handleConfirmMove flow with Idempotency-Key header. usePMSData.useUpdateBooking also sends Idempotency-Key. The /calendar route does NOT exist - correct route is /reservation-calendar.

idempotency_verification.same_key_same_payload: Returns cached response without duplicate processing

outbox_verification.no_event_when: Target state same as current state (no changes to persist)

frontend_route_correction.note: Route defined in App.js at lines 637-650
